name: GetOrderTotal
legacy_code:
Sub GetOrderTotal(orderId)
    Dim rs, total
    Set rs = conn.Execute("SELECT SUM(Price) as Total FROM OrderItems WHERE OrderId=" & orderId)
    
    If Not rs.EOF Then
        total = rs.Fields("Total")
        WScript.Echo "Total: " & total
    End If
    
    rs.Close
    Set rs = Nothing
End Sub
migration_target: public async Task GetOrderTotalAsync(...) in OrderService.cs
